shinyresults 0.37.0

Load Variable Configuration

Source: R/loadVariableConfig.R
loadVariableConfig.Rd

Loads variable configuration from YAML file with fallback hierarchy. The function searches for configuration in the following order: 1. Explicit path provided via configFile parameter 2. User config at ~/.shinyresults/variables.yaml 3. Package default at inst/extdata/variables_default.yaml

Usage

loadVariableConfig(configFile = NULL)

Arguments

configFile

Optional path to a YAML configuration file

Value

List containing variable configuration with presets, key_variables, and defaults

Author

Florian Humpenoeder

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# Load default configuration
config <- loadVariableConfig()

# Load custom configuration
config <- loadVariableConfig("path/to/my_variables.yaml")
} # }

On this page
